title: citrus odorata
intro: Citrus odorata, also known as Mayur champa or Indian frangipani, is a plant species belonging to the Rutaceae family, characterized by its fragrant flowers and medicinal properties. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Citrus odorata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from menstrual cramps, among others. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, extracts, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
